% Auto-generated by Code/3.2.MW-Stats.R (do not edit by hand).
% One table per model: bias--variance, calibration--refinement, and likelihood--base rate (shared MSE, V(X), V(Y)).
% booktabs required; \small applied inside each table. Label: \label{tb:decomp-<ModelSlug>} (one per table).

% ----- Model: Raw -----
\begin{table}[!ht]
\centering
\caption{Results of bias--variance, calibration--refinement, and likelihood--base rate decompositions of mean square error of the raw products. The results are written as exponentiations, such that all bases have the unit of W\,m$^{-2}$. Var.\,X $=\mathbb{V}(X)$; Var.\,Y $=\mathbb{V}(Y)$; Cov $=\mathtt{Cov}(X,Y)$; Uncond.\ bias $=[\mathbb{E}(X)-\mathbb{E}(Y)]^2$; Calibration $=\mathbb{E}_X[X-\mathbb{E}(Y|X)]^2$; Resolution $=\mathbb{E}_X[\mathbb{E}(Y|X)-\mathbb{E}(Y)]^2$; Type-2 cond.\ bias $=\mathbb{E}_Y[Y-\mathbb{E}(X|Y)]^2$; Discrimination $=\mathbb{E}_Y[\mathbb{E}(X|Y)-\mathbb{E}(X)]^2$.}
\label{tb:decomp-Raw}
\small
\begin{tabular}{lccccccccc}
\toprule
 & & \multicolumn{4}{c}{Bias--variance} & \multicolumn{2}{c}{Calibration--refinement} & \multicolumn{2}{c}{Likelihood--base rate} \\
\cmidrule(lr){3-6}\cmidrule(lr){7-8}\cmidrule(lr){9-10}
 & MSE & Var.\,X & Var.\,Y & Cov & Uncond.\ bias & Calibration & Resolution & Type-2 cond.\ bias & Discrimination \\
\midrule
  $y_\text{H},\, x_\text{P}$ & $ 109^2$ & $ 230^2$ & $ 240^2$ & $ 225^2$ & $ 51^2$ & $ 54^2$ & $ 221^2$ & $ 69^2$ & $ 214^2$ \\
  $y_\text{H},\, x_\text{S}$ & $ 94^2$ & $ 242^2$ & $ 240^2$ & $ 233^2$ & $ 30^2$ & $ 39^2$ & $ 224^2$ & $ 39^2$ & $ 226^2$ \\
  $y_\text{L},\, x_\text{P}$ & $ 112^2$ & $ 230^2$ & $ 248^2$ & $ 228^2$ & $ 50^2$ & $ 53^2$ & $ 228^2$ & $ 72^2$ & $ 213^2$ \\
  $y_\text{L},\, x_\text{S}$ & $ 95^2$ & $ 242^2$ & $ 248^2$ & $ 236^2$ & $ 29^2$ & $ 36^2$ & $ 232^2$ & $ 43^2$ & $ 226^2$ \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\normalsize
\end{table}
